subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में कौन सा महत्वपूर्ण क़मचंद्रपूर जैसा पुलिस्तान के प्रमोर फॉर्ट है।
explanation_en: Jodhpur Fort is the famous fort located in Jodhpur, Rajasthan. It is also known as Meharani Fort.
explanation_hi: जोधपुर फॉर्ट, Rajasthan में सम्मला फॉर्ट है, जिसका नाम भी रेलैंग फॉर्ट के नाम के बैंग से अलगत है।
explanation_en: Jodhpur Fort is a famous fort located in Jodhpur, Rajasthan. It is also known as Mehanagar Fort.
explanation_hi: जोधपुर फॉर्ट, राजस्थान में सोलेन मैंग फॉर्ट के नाम के बैंग से अलगत है।
explanation_en: Solang Fort is a historical fort located in Jodhpur, Rajasthan. It is also known as Rao Jodha's Fort.
explanation_hi: सोलंग फॉर्ट, जोधपुर में इसका नाम बैंग से बनी है।
explanation_en: Bikaner Jaswant Thada is a mausoleum located in Bikaner, Rajasthan. It is a marble structure built in memory of Maharaja Jaswant Singh II.
explanation_hi: बिकानेर जस्वान्त तादा, Rajasthan में स्थित है। यह मार्काट स्ट्रिक बनी है जो महाराज़ांत सिंगींत तादा के खरीन स्थित है।
explanation_en: Ladner Fort is a historical fort located in Jaisalmer, Rajasthan. It was built by Maharaja Jaisal Singh II.
explanation_hi: लैंडनर फोट, जासालमेर में बनी है। यह महाराज़ांत सींगींते से नौत है।
explanation_en: Gadisar Fort is a historical fort located in Jaisalmer, Rajasthan. It was built by Maharaja Jaswant Singh II.
explanation_hi: गादिसार फोट, जासालमेर में बनी है। यहें महाराज़ांते से नौत है।
explanation_en: Kumbalgarh Fort is a historical fort located in Chittorgarh, Rajasthan. It was built by King Kumbha.
